title: Immune
lines: A sudden, shocking realization hits you with the weight of concrete.
You haven't been affected by the airborne serum. You've breathed it for seven days, sleeping outside under the stars. Your vitals are perfect.
You grab the classified documents, shove them into your solitary camping backpack, and push open the heavy security doors.
The dawn sun greets you. You survived the horrors of this infected land. Now, you hold the cure.

options.desc: Play Again! You beat the game!
